name: office-collection
description: Monorepo Office Collection — landing (site) + portal de colaboradores, um deploy só.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n site,portal -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix apps/site-institucional run dev" "npm --prefix apps/portal-colaboradores run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/site-institucional install && npm --prefix apps/site-institucional run build && npm --prefix apps/portal-colaboradores install && npm --prefix apps/portal-colaboradores run build && rm -rf dist && cp -r apps/site-institucional/dist dist && cp -r apps/portal-colaboradores/dist dist/portal
